subtasks.description: An infrastructure engineer proposes rolling out Docker image changes to all microservices in production without prior staging validation.

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.reason: Proposed action violates three critical policies: (1) POL-601 requires 48-hour staging validation before production rollout, which is bypassed entirely; (2) POL-602 mandates change board approval and monitoring setup, with no evidence of either; (3) POL-603 requires rollback capability and traffic monitoring as preconditions, which have not been configured.
applied_constraints: Staging validation required for minimum 48 hours before production deployment
Change board approval must be obtained prior to rollout
Post-deployment monitoring infrastructure must be configured
Automated rollback capability must be verified and tested
Traffic monitoring and alerting must be active before image deployment begins
